name: fluidmetronome
description: Starter template for a Progressive Web App metronome aimed at uneven rhythmic structures common in Swedish folk traditions, including patterns built from variable step lengths rather than only uniform beats.

scripts.test:audio: node tests/audio/worklet-stall.mjs && node tests/audio/preset-levels.mjs && node tests/audio/modulator-direction.mjs && node tests/audio/transport-lifecycle.mjs
scripts.test:browser: node tests/browser/layout.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/column-menu.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/export-scope.mjs && node tests/browser/pattern-io.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/rename.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/pattern-stats.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/ticks-input.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/modulator-shape.mjs chromium && node tests/browser/transport-recovery.mjs chromium
scripts.test:webkit: node tests/browser/layout.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/column-menu.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/export-scope.mjs && node tests/browser/pattern-io.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/rename.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/pattern-stats.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/ticks-input.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/modulator-shape.mjs webkit && node tests/browser/transport-recovery.mjs webkit
scripts.test: npm run test:audio && npm run test:browser
